programs.title: Border Security: Australia's Front Line
programs.desc: A man arrives from Bangkok with a false passport and an old ratty children's book  a man arriving from Lebanon gets very angry at his wife for hiding undeclared food from him  DAF officers scan a parcel from Germany that contains an animal.

programs.title: Backcountry Rescue
programs.desc: When a mountain biker crashes on a remote trail, the SAR team scrambles into action with limited light and difficult access.

programs.title: Backcountry Rescue
programs.desc: When three calls come in within hours, Teton County Search and Rescue faces its toughest day yet  a lost hiker, a snowmobile crash, and a looming avalanche all demand immediate response.

programs.title: Backcountry Rescue
programs.desc: The team races to find two overdue snowmobilers in the remote backcountry in harsh, low-visibility conditions.

programs.title: Backcountry Rescue
programs.desc: The team races to save a teen who drove a snowmobile off a cliff. A rookie is tested in a high-stakes rescue.
